scenarios.name: db-service-mocking
scenarios.rationale: Baseline used spyOn without auto-mock, omitted clearAllMocks, and used try/catch for the async error; treatment used jest.mock + jest.mocked, beforeEach clearAllMocks, and expect(...).rejects.toThrow for the not-found case.

scenarios.name: ci-coverage-gate
scenarios.rationale: Baseline only set a lines threshold, used wrong key, omitted --ci and artifact upload; treatment set all four coverageThresholds with ts-jest preset, ran npx jest --ci --coverage --maxWorkers, and uploaded coverage with actions/upload-artifact.
